creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have just made and uploaded Cosmo Gang the Puzzle for X11.
ftp://ftp.noc.titech.ac.jp/pub/tmp/aki/in.coming/PORTS/Nakai/cosmo.tgz
This software is originated in Japan and developed for X11 also in Japan.
Linux JE distribution have already included this cosmo.
I would like you to have a look....

					Yukihiro Nakai
